[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 11000100 3
2 00000110 2
3 01011000 3
4 10111110 6
5 10111111 7
6 01110011 5
7 11001101 5

12 21 00000000 a match 0

34 43 10111110 6 match 4

56 65 01000001 2
67 76 11000100 3 match 1
70 07 11000100 3 match 1
